title: Arm Guards
description: Adds Arm Guards to Minecraft inspired by the Piglin Brute!
body:
Arm Guards

Adds Arm Guards to Minecraft inspired by the Piglin Brute!

Features

  • Arm Guards can be equipped with Trinkets!
  • Left Handed support! Equipped Arm Guards automatically switch to your off hand.
  • Armor Trim support!

FAQ

  • Q: Will the mod support Fabric, Forge, or other mod loaders?
    A: No, this mod will only support Quilt.
  • Q: Will the mod support older version?
    A: No, this mod will only update to the latest versions.
  • Q: Can I repost this mod?
    A: No, this mod should only be available on Modrinth.
  • Q: Can I use this mod in a Modpack?
    A: Yes.
